text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
12 
MDCD_CMC_COV_MOS 
LABEL: 
Medicaid — Comprehensive Managed Care Months 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medicaid 
Comprehensive Managed Care Organization (MCO) Managed Care Plan. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Demographic and Eligibility (DE) File 
VALUES: 
0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment) 
COMMENT: 
CCW obtains this directly
